Hi, I'm Jerika

A social media manager, branding expert, virtual assistant, and digital strategist passionate about helping businesses build a strong online presence.

I specialize in social media management, creative graphics, website design, branding, and virtual assistance — combining creativity and strategy to craft engaging content and impactful designs.

With a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science from STI College and certifications in Social Media Management and GoHighLevel Automation Mastery, I bring both technical expertise and creative vision to every project.

Social MediaBrandingWeb DesignVirtual AssistantSEOContent StrategyGoHighLevel
What I Offer

My Services

Strategic digital solutions tailored to grow your brand, engage your audience, and drive real results.

01◆

Social Media Management

Content creation, scheduling, engagement, and analytics tracking to build your brand's online presence and grow your audience organically.

02◇

Creative Graphics & Branding

Logo design, brand identity, and visual content that captures your brand essence and makes a lasting impression.

03▲

Website Design

Creating visually appealing and user-friendly websites that enhance brand presence and convert visitors into customers.

04○

Virtual Assistance

Supporting businesses with admin tasks, customer engagement, email management, invoicing, booking, and content creation.

05⚙

Automation & Funnels

ManyChat, GoHighLevel booking automations, review campaigns, and chat funnels that save time and convert leads on autopilot.

Automation & Funnels

ManyChat chatbot flows, GoHighLevel booking & review automation campaigns

M
ManyChat — Booking Flow
Trigger
User comments "BOOK" or sends DM
↓
Auto-Reply
"Hey! Ready to book? Pick your preferred service below"
↓
Facial Treatment
Hair Service
Consultation
Other
↓
Send Booking Link
Redirects to calendar with pre-filled service selection
↓
Confirmation + Reminder
Auto-sends confirmation + 24hr reminder message
GHL
GoHighLevel — Review Campaign
Trigger
Appointment status changes to "Completed"
↓
Wait 2 Hours
Delay to allow client to experience the service
↓
SMS + Email
"Thank you for visiting! We'd love your feedback. Leave us a Google review?"
↓
Positive
Direct to Google Review page
Negative
Internal feedback form (protect reputation)
↓
Follow-Up (If No Response)
3-day reminder: "Your feedback means the world to us!"
GHL
GoHighLevel — Booking Automation
Trigger
New lead fills out contact form / landing page
↓
Instant Auto-Response
SMS: "Thanks for reaching out! Let's get you booked in."
↓
Calendar Link
Auto-sends booking calendar with available slots
↓
Pipeline Update
Contact moves to "Appointment Booked" stage
↓
24hr Reminder
1hr Reminder
Post-Visit Follow-up
M
ManyChat — Lead Qualifier
Trigger
User clicks IG story link or comments keyword
↓
Qualifying Questions
"What service are you interested in?" + "What's your budget range?"
↓
Tag & Segment
Auto-tags lead as Hot/Warm/Cold based on responses
↓
Deliver Value
Sends personalized offer, PDF guide, or booking link based on segment

Case Studies

Cleaning Business

From Zero to Full Online Presence

A residential and commercial cleaning company needed to establish their digital footprint and attract local clients through social media.

233
Posts Created
3x
Engagement Growth
What I Did
  • Built and managed entire social media presence from scratch
  • Created branded content templates and a consistent visual identity
  • Developed customer review graphics and promotional materials
  • Managed community engagement and customer inquiries
Before
0 Posts
After
233 Posts
Health IT

Scaling an Education Brand on Social

A health IT education brand wanted to grow their audience, boost engagement, and drive course enrollments through strategic social content.

+340%
Page Growth
1 mo
Timeframe
What I Did
  • Redesigned Instagram feed with cohesive red-and-white brand identity
  • Created educational carousels, reels, and testimonial graphics
  • Implemented giveaway campaigns to boost reach and followers
  • Produced video content including doodle animations and talking-head reels
Before
Low Reach
After 1 Month
+340%

Rebrand
